chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حَرَّمَ كُلَّ مُسْكِرٍ قَلِيلَهُ وَ كَثِيرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Rasool-Allahsaww prohibited every intoxicant, a little or a lot

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/267)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/267)
text: ابْتَدَأَنِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْماً مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ أَسْأَلَهُ فَقَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كُلُّ مُسْكِرٍ حَرَامٌ قَالَ قُلْتُ أَصْلَحَكَ اللَّهُ كُلُّهُ حَرَامٌ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ الْجُرْعَةُ مِنْهُ حَرَامٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina, from Al Fuzayl Bin Yasaar who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> initiated me one day from without me having asked him<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Every intoxicant is Prohibited’. I said, ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Keep you<sup>asws</sup> well! All of it is Prohibited?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, (even) one dosage from it is prohibited’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah from al-Fudayl ibn Yasar who has said the following: “One day abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, initiating from himself and without my asking said, ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, all intoxicating liquor is unlawful.’ I then asked saying, ‘I pray to Allah to keep you well, is all of it unlawful?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, even one sip is unlawful.’”
